## (= SCRIPT 000 =)
A HORROR MOD FOCUSED ON PLACING STRUCTURES, SPAWNING ENTITIES.

Mod is being remade, but will work on the mod more.
The mod might have broke. So i remade it (2 times)! Dont worry, the older versions are still available.

- 5 ENTITIES
- 0 STRUCTURES | will add in the future (50 bajillion years)
- 8 EVENTS
- - - - - - - - - - - - -
**Mod can:**
- Spawn ~~structures~~

- do stuff ingame

MOD IS SAFE TO PLAY
GECKOLIB NEEDED
